meaning: n.桅,桅杆,柱,旗杆,天线竿vt.装桅杆于
examples: The collective name for mast, boom and sails on a boat is the 'rig'.
It was Smee who tied her to the mast.
He climbs the mast... Then he falls down!
In April 2009, 16 people were hurt when their balloon struck a mobile phone mast.
The flag at South Kesteven District Council's offices in Grantham is flying at half-mast.
